variations.caption: Sleep cooler, wake sharper. The Eight Sleep Pod 4 Ultra tunes your bed to the perfect temperature all night — built for humid SG nights, lah.

captionsByLocale.en-SG: Sleep cooler, wake sharper. The Eight Sleep Pod 4 Ultra tunes your bed to the perfect temperature all night — built for humid SG nights, lah.
captionsByLocale.zh-Hans-SG: 睡得更凉,醒得更精神。Eight Sleep Pod 4 Ultra 整夜自动调温,完美对付新加坡闷热夜晚,一觉到天亮。
captionsByLocale.ms-SG: Tidur lebih sejuk, bangun lebih segar. Eight Sleep Pod 4 Ultra atur suhu katil sepanjang malam — sesuai untuk malam lembap SG.
captionsByLocale.ta-SG: குளிர்ச்சியாக தூங்குங்கள், புத்துணர்ச்சியுடன் எழுங்கள். Eight Sleep Pod 4 Ultra இரவு முழுவதும் உங்கள் படுக்கையை சரியான வெப்பநிலையில் வைக்கும் — SG இரவுகளுக்கு ஏற்றது.

variations.moodNote: Cinematic cool-blue minimalism, centered hero, restful tech-forward calm

content.en-SG: Pod 4 Ultra tunes your bed all night — made for humid SG nights.
content.zh-Hans-SG: Pod 4 Ultra 整夜智能控温，专为新加坡闷热夜晚而生。
content.ms-SG: Pod 4 Ultra atur suhu katil sepanjang malam — sesuai untuk malam lembap SG.
content.ta-SG: Pod 4 Ultra இரவு முழுவதும் வெப்பநிலையை சரி செய்யும் — SG இரவுகளுக்கு ஏற்றது.

input.prompt:
Eight Sleep Pod 4 Ultra cooling mattress cover
Hero subject: Eight Sleep Pod 4 Ultra cooling mattress cover.
Mood: cinematic.
Compose this image so it remains readable when cropped to any of these aspect ratios: 1:1, 4:5, 9:16, 16:9. The hero subject must stay centered and uncropped in every one.
Reserve the following regions as soft negative space — flat tone, low detail, no clutter — so editable text overlays can be placed there separately:
- the upper-center region (90% × 18%) for the headline.
- the lower-center region (90% × 17%) for the caption.
Primary subject anchor: the central 64% × 64% region of the frame; this region must survive every crop.
Do not render any text, logos, or watermarks in the image; all copy will be added as a separate editable overlay.

plan.rewrittenPrompt: Cinematic product shot of a sleek Eight Sleep Pod 4 Ultra cooling mattress cover on a minimalist platform bed, centered, soft blue-teal volumetric light, subtle mist, dark gradient backdrop, clean empty space top and bottom, no text.
plan.rationale: Square format with centered hero and flat upper/lower negative space ensures safe cropping to 4:5, 9:16, and 16:9.
